description: Embark on a breathtaking journey through Norway, where stunning fjords meet vibrant city life. This 7-day adventure will take you from the picturesque streets of Bergen, known for its colorful wooden houses and stunning natural surroundings, to the bustling capital of Oslo, rich in culture and history. Experience the majestic beauty of Norway's landscapes, from serene fjord cruises to scenic train rides, all while indulging in local cuisine and immersing yourself in the unique Norwegian lifestyle. Get ready for an unforgettable family trip that combines nature, heritage, and the thrill of exploration!

activities.description: Enjoy a delicious meal at Bryggen Tracteursted, a cozy restaurant located in the historic Bryggen Wharf area. The menu features traditional Norwegian dishes made from local ingredients, perfect for starting your Bergen adventure.

Stroll through the UNESCO World Heritage site of Bryggen, known for its colorful wooden houses and rich history. Take your time to explore the artisan shops and galleries that line the narrow alleyways.

activities.activity: Take the Fløibanen Funicular to Mount Fløyen
activities.description: Ride the Fløibanen funicular to the top of Mount Fløyen for breathtaking views of Bergen and the surrounding fjords. Once at the top, enjoy a leisurely hike or simply relax and take in the stunning scenery.

Indulge in a fine dining experience at Restaurant 1877, known for its exquisite seafood and local dishes. The ambiance is warm and inviting, making it a perfect spot for a family dinner after a day of exploration.

End your day with a peaceful evening walk along the waterfront. The views of the harbor and the surrounding mountains are particularly magical at sunset, providing a perfect backdrop for family photos.

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Baker Brun, known for its freshly baked pastries and traditional Norwegian breakfast options. Enjoy a cozy atmosphere as you fuel up for a day of exploration.

Explore the stunning Fantoft Stave Church, a beautiful example of traditional Norwegian wooden architecture. The intricate carvings and serene surroundings make it a perfect spot for photography and reflection.
Stroll through the vibrant Bergen Fish Market, where you can sample fresh seafood and local delicacies. It's a great place to experience the local culture and perhaps pick up some unique souvenirs.
Enjoy a delightful lunch at Restaurant Enhjørningen, known for its fresh seafood dishes and traditional Norwegian cuisine. The restaurant's charming atmosphere adds to the dining experience.

Wander through the historic Bryggen Wharf, a UNESCO World Heritage site. The colorful wooden buildings and narrow alleyways are filled with shops, galleries, and cafes, perfect for leisurely exploration.
Ride the Fløibanen Funicular to the top of Mount Fløyen for breathtaking views of Bergen and the surrounding fjords. Enjoy a short hike or relax at the viewpoint before descending back to the city.

Indulge in a memorable dinner at Cornelius Seafood Restaurant, located on a small island with stunning views of the fjords. The restaurant specializes in fresh seafood and offers a unique dining experience.
End your day with a relaxing evening stroll along the wharf, taking in the beautiful lights reflecting on the water. It's a perfect way to unwind and soak in the charm of Bergen at night.

transit.memo: Start your day with a scenic cruise through the stunning fjords.

activities.description: Embark on a breathtaking cruise from Bergen through the majestic Nærøyfjord and Aurlandsfjord. Experience the dramatic cliffs and serene waters, with opportunities to spot waterfalls and wildlife along the way.
Enjoy a delicious lunch on board the cruise, featuring local Norwegian cuisine. Savor the flavors while taking in the panoramic views of the fjords.
Continue your cruise into Aurlandsfjord, where you can admire the picturesque villages and lush landscapes. Don't forget your camera for this stunning scenery!
After a day of exploring the fjords, return to Bergen. Relax and reflect on the incredible sights you've seen during your adventure.
Indulge in a delightful dinner at Bryggen Tracteursted, a restaurant located in the historic Bryggen Wharf. Enjoy traditional Norwegian dishes made with fresh, local ingredients.
Take a leisurely evening stroll through the charming streets of Bryggen, a UNESCO World Heritage site. The colorful wooden houses and the vibrant atmosphere make for a perfect end to your day.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic views of the Norwegian countryside during the train ride.

activities.description: Indulge in a variety of local and international dishes at this vibrant food hall. It's a great place to sample Norwegian specialties and enjoy the lively atmosphere.
Explore the fascinating history of the Vikings through well-preserved ships and artifacts. This museum offers a unique glimpse into Norway's maritime heritage.
Take a leisurely walk in Frogner Park, home to the famous Vigeland sculptures. The park's beautiful gardens and artistic installations make it a perfect spot for relaxation.
Savor fresh seafood dishes at this renowned restaurant located by the waterfront. The ambiance and views of the harbor enhance the dining experience.

activities.activity: Evening walk along the Oslo waterfront
activities.description: End your day with a peaceful stroll along the waterfront, enjoying the views of the Oslo Opera House and the fjord. It's a perfect way to unwind after a day of exploration.
Start your day with a hearty Norwegian breakfast at Café Sorgenfri, known for its cozy atmosphere and delicious open-faced sandwiches. It's a great way to fuel up for a day of exploration!

Visit Vigeland Park, the world's largest sculpture park made by a single artist, Gustav Vigeland. Stroll through the park and admire over 200 sculptures that capture the human experience in various forms. It's a peaceful oasis in the heart of Oslo.
Head to Mathallen Oslo, a vibrant food hall where you can sample a variety of local and international dishes. From fresh seafood to artisanal cheeses, there's something for everyone to enjoy.

Explore the stunning Oslo Opera House, an architectural masterpiece where you can walk on the roof for panoramic views of the city and the fjord. Don't miss the chance to take some memorable photos here!

Embark on a scenic fjord cruise to experience the breathtaking beauty of Oslo's surrounding islands and coastline. This is a perfect way to relax and take in the stunning natural landscapes of Norway.

activities.activity: Dinner at Restaurant Eik Annen Etage
activities.description: Enjoy a fine dining experience at Restaurant Eik Annen Etage, where you can savor exquisite Norwegian cuisine made from fresh, local ingredients. The elegant setting and attentive service make it a perfect end to your day.

activities.activity: Evening Stroll along the Aker Brygge
activities.description: Take a leisurely evening stroll along Aker Brygge, a lively waterfront area filled with shops, bars, and restaurants. Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere and perhaps grab a nightcap while overlooking the fjord.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Café Sorgenfri, known for its traditional Norwegian dishes and cozy atmosphere. Enjoy freshly baked bread, local cheeses, and a selection of cured meats to fuel your day of exploration.

Dive into the world of Edvard Munch at the Munch Museum, home to an extensive collection of his works, including the iconic 'The Scream'. The museum's modern architecture and beautiful waterfront location make it a perfect spot to appreciate art and nature.

Head to Mathallen Oslo, a vibrant food hall offering a variety of local and international cuisines. Sample delicious dishes from various stalls, including fresh seafood, artisanal cheeses, and gourmet street food, all under one roof.

After lunch, take a leisurely stroll to Akershus Fortress, a medieval castle that offers stunning views of the Oslo Fjord. Explore the grounds, visit the museums, and learn about Norway's history while enjoying the serene surroundings.

activities.activity: Fjord Cruise on the Oslo Fjord
activities.description: Embark on a scenic cruise of the Oslo Fjord, where you'll be treated to breathtaking views of the surrounding islands and coastal landscapes. This is a perfect opportunity to relax and take in the natural beauty of Norway from the water.

activities.activity: Dinner at Restaurant Eik Annen Etage
activities.description: End your day with a delightful dinner at Restaurant Eik Annen Etage, known for its exquisite Norwegian cuisine and elegant ambiance. Enjoy a multi-course meal featuring seasonal ingredients and local flavors, making for a memorable dining experience.

transit.memo: Direct flight from Oslo to Washington D.C.

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty Norwegian breakfast at Café Sorgenfri, known for its cozy atmosphere and delicious open-faced sandwiches. It's a great way to fuel up before your journey home.

Take a morning stroll to the iconic Oslo Opera House. You can walk on the roof for stunning views of the Oslofjord and the city. The architecture is a masterpiece and a perfect spot for some last-minute photos.

Wander around Aker Brygge, a vibrant waterfront area filled with shops, cafes, and restaurants. It's a lovely place to enjoy the views of the harbor and perhaps pick up some souvenirs before heading to the airport.
